title: pitcairnia pungens var. pungens
intro: Pitcairnia pungens var. pungens, also known as the 'Dwarf Pineapple Plant', is a type of terrestrial bromeliad that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pitcairnia pungens var. pungens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
